chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zynon/LdapRelayScan (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zodiacon/HookHunter (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zmap/zmap (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the web category. Fits when the engagement needs: Drupwn claims to provide an efficient way to gather drupal information.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Drupwn claims to provide an efficient way to gather drupal information.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: pip3 install -r requirements.txt; docker run --rm -it drupwn --help. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `python3 drupwn --help`. Further invocations from upstream: `python3 setup.py install`; `drupwn --help`. Drupwn claims to provide an efficient way to gather drupal information.

name: drupwn
summary: Drupwn claims to provide an efficient way to gather drupal information.

trust.warning: Attribution / index entry only. The operator must audit the code, the README, the license, and the releases before invoking. Phase 5 — entry is auto-generated from the operator's curated fetch list; no automated enrichment yet.

use_cases: When you need web, use drupwn because Drupwn claims to provide an efficient way to gather drupal information.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `python3 drupwn --help` as documented upstream for drupwn.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `python3 setup.py install` as documented upstream for drupwn.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `drupwn --help` as documented upstream for drupwn.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `drupwn -h` as documented upstream for drupwn.
When chaining web tools, pair drupwn with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `drupwn --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
